basic_details.job_title: GRID India Part-time Medical Consultant Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline
basic_details.short_information: Grid Controller of India (GRID India) has published the Part-time Medical Consultant (Homeopathy) Notification 2026 on 13 May 2026. The recruitment drive aims to fill 1 Part-time Medical Consultant (Homeopathy) position. Candidates holding a DHMS/BHMS Degree from a recognised Indian University, with a minimum of 15 years of experience after DHMS/BHMS including at least 10 years as a Medical Consultant with other CPSEs under the Central Government, are eligible to apply offline at the official website. The application process will be active until 27 May 2026, and candidates can easily access th

age_limit.details: Please refer to the official notification for age limit details.

qualification.education_qualification: DHMS/BHMS Degree from a recognised Indian University., Minimum 15 years of experience after DHMS/BHMS with minimum 10 years Association as Medical Consultant with other CPSEs under Central Government.
qualification.details: Part-time Medical Consultant (Homeopathy): DHMS/BHMS Degree from a recognised Indian University. Minimum 15 years of experience after DHMS/BHMS with minimum 10 years as Medical Consultant with other CPSEs under Central Government.

salary_details.details: Consultation charge @ Rs. 2000/- per sitting & Conveyance charge @ Rs. 1000 per sitting.

selection_process: Please refer to the official notification for selection process details.
how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for GRID India Part-time Medical Consultant (Homeopathy) Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: grid-india.in.
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 27-05-2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the GRID India Part-time Medical Consultant (Homeopathy) recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your application for the Part-time Medical Consultant (Homeopathy) position at GRID India is 27th May 2026.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for this post?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess a DHMS/BHMS Degree from a recognized Indian University, along with significant experience as specified in the notification.

faq.question: Q3. How many vacancies are available for the Part-time Medical Consultant (Homeopathy) post?
faq.answer: There is one vacancy available for the Part-time Medical Consultant (Homeopathy) position in the Grid Controller of India recruitment.

faq.question: Q4. What is the application mode for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application mode for this recruitment is offline. Candidates need to send their applications via post.

faq.question: Q5. What is the salary offered for the Part-time Medical Consultant (Homeopathy) role?
faq.answer: The salary is offered as a consultation charge of Rs. 2000/- per sitting and a conveyance charge of Rs. 1000/- per sitting.

faq.question: Q6. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment.

faq.question: Q7. What is the minimum experience required for the Part-time Medical Consultant (Homeopathy) post?
faq.answer: A minimum of 15 years of experience after DHMS/BHMS is required, with at least 10 years as a Medical Consultant with other CPSEs under the Central Government.

faq.question: Q8. Where can I find the official notification and application form?
faq.answer: The official notification and application form can be accessed through the links provided in the "Important Links" section of this article.

faq.question: Q9. What is the job type for this position?
faq.answer: The job type for this position is Part-Time.

faq.question: Q10. Which city is the job located in?
faq.answer: The job is located in New Delhi, Delhi, with a pincode of 110019.
